title: tounatea calophylla
intro: Tounatea calophylla is a type of medicinal plant also known as the "Red Barked Tree," a species of the Tounatea genus. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems. The medicinal properties of Tounatea calophylla include its ability to reduce fever, act as an expectorant, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for the health. Herbal preparations of Tounatea calophylla include tea infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
